requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Power Quality, and Communications

summary.en: Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed national smart-charging platform comparable to Qatar's Tarsheed. For networked commercial chargers, OCPP should be specified by the charge-point operator, site owner, or fleet operator as the practical interoperability baseline. IEC 61000-series EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared for chargers connected to SEGESA supply, including harmonic current, conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, surge, and voltage-dip behaviour. Cellular modem, RFID, payment, and cloud features may create separate radio, cybersecurity, or data-hosting requirements that must be confirmed by the project owner and local counsel.
summary.zh: 未确认赤道几内亚存在类似卡塔尔Tarsheed的国家智慧充电平台。对于联网商业充电桩，OCPP应由充电点运营商、场地方或车队运营商作为实务互操作基线指定。接入SEGESA供电的充电桩应准备IEC 61000系列EMC和电能质量证据，包括谐波电流、传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、浪涌及电压暂降行为。蜂窝通信模块、RFID、支付和云功能可能产生单独的无线电、网络安全或数据托管要求，应由项目业主和当地法律顾问确认。
summary.zht: 未確認赤道幾內亞存在類似卡塔爾Tarsheed的國家智慧充電平台。對於聯網商業充電樁，OCPP應由充電點運營商、場地方或車隊運營商作為實務互操作基線指定。接入SEGESA供電的充電樁應準備IEC 61000系列EMC和電能質量證據，包括諧波電流、傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、浪湧及電壓暫降行為。蜂窩通訊模組、RFID、支付和雲功能可能產生單獨的無線電、網絡安全或數據託管要求，應由項目業主和當地法律顧問確認。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office interoperability
IEC 61000 series — EMC, immunity, harmonics, voltage fluctuation, and surge context
IEC 61851-24 and ISO 15118 where CCS2 DC communication is required
Project-specific CPO, fleet, telecom, and payment-system requirements

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN-based communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. China operators may also use proprietary back-office protocols or OCPP variants. That China communication package does not prove compatibility with an Equatorial Guinea charge-point operator's OCPP back office, nor does it prove IEC 61000 EMC behaviour at 230/400 V, 50 Hz on the local network.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常使用GB/T 27930-2023基于CAN的非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统通信。中国运营商也可能使用私有后台协议或OCPP变体。该中国通信资料包不能证明与赤道几内亚充电点运营商OCPP后台兼容，也不能证明在当地230/400 V、50 Hz电网上满足IEC 61000 EMC行为。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常使用GB/T 27930-2023基於CAN的非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統通訊。中國運營商也可能使用私有後台協議或OCPP變體。該中國通訊資料包不能證明與赤道幾內亞充電點運營商OCPP後台兼容，也不能證明在當地230/400 V、50 Hz電網上滿足IEC 61000 EMC行為。

standards_or_laws: China EMC and radio approvals where in scope

gap.en: For networked chargers, confirm the required OCPP version, backend certification process, SIM/APN or connectivity requirements, payment integration, remote diagnostics, and cybersecurity responsibilities before shipment. For EMC and power quality, provide IEC 61000 evidence and harmonic/load data at the actual 230/400 V configuration. For CCS2 DC chargers, replace GB/T 27930-only communication with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack where required by vehicles or the CPO.
gap.zh: 对于联网充电桩，应在出货前确认所需OCPP版本、后台认证流程、SIM/APN或连接要求、支付集成、远程诊断和网络安全责任。对于EMC和电能质量，应按实际230/400 V配置提供IEC 61000证据及谐波/负载数据。对于CCS2直流充电桩，应在车辆或充电点运营商要求时，将仅支持GB/T 27930的通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈。
gap.zht: 對於聯網充電樁，應在出貨前確認所需OCPP版本、後台認證流程、SIM/APN或連接要求、支付集成、遠程診斷和網絡安全責任。對於EMC和電能質量，應按實際230/400 V配置提供IEC 61000證據及諧波/負載數據。對於CCS2直流充電樁，應在車輛或充電點運營商要求時，將僅支持GB/T 27930的通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP is mandatory when required by the CPO, fleet, or site owner; IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence should be treated as mandatory for commercial grid-connected projects and lender/EPC review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and not a CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP is not confirmed as a national platform mandate in Equatorial Guinea, but it is the practical interoperability baseline for commercial networked chargers. GB/T 27930-only DC communication and China EMC evidence do not prove compatibility with IEC Type 2 / CCS2 deployments or SEGESA-connected sites.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未确认OCPP是赤道几内亚国家平台强制要求，但它是商业联网充电桩的实务互操作基线。仅支持GB/T 27930的直流通信和中国EMC证据，不能证明兼容IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署或接入SEGESA的站点。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未確認OCPP是赤道幾內亞國家平台強制要求，但它是商業聯網充電樁的實務互操作基線。僅支持GB/T 27930的直流通訊和中國EMC證據，不能證明兼容IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署或接入SEGESA的站點。
